## Summary

Describe the problem and the implemented change.

## Evidence integrity

- [ ] Raw EML semantics remain unchanged.
- [ ] Canonical message and mailbox occurrence semantics remain separate.
- [ ] No IMAP mutation operation was introduced.
- [ ] Credentials and real mailbox content are not included.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation updated when public behavior changed.
- [ ] `python scripts/quality.py` passes.
- [ ] Changelog updated when user-visible.
